insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insights into the topics that need your attention. By focusing on building a daily study habit, even just 10-15 minutes a day, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a momentum-building routine that will help you make rapid progress and start seeing improvements in your scores.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
